body_transformation: Clefairy's rounded plump silhouette remains intact, now rendered in deep violet with ebony black streaks tracing its soft curves. Its large round eyes retain their expressive shape but now feature hollow sockets swirling with crimson mist, while the smiling mouth subtly shifts to a faint, ghostly grin. The short stubby legs and pointed ears with white tips transform into translucent limbs with internal energy currents visible beneath pale silver skin, and the curled tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing faint crimson mist. The once smooth pink skin gains a subtle energy ripple distortion, enhancing its ethereal presence without altering its original structure.
signature_feature: Tail tip: dissolving shadowy vapour with crimson mist trails.
